'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    curr = head
    prev = None
    while curr :
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev 
        prev = curr
        curr = nxt
    return prev

def matchingNumber(s, t):
    l=[]
    x=0
    for i in t:
        p=s[x:]
        # print(p)
        if i not in p:
            return False
        x=s.index(i)
        x+=1
        
    return True

def matchingNumber(s, t):
    l=[]
    x=0
    for i in t:
        p=s[x:]
        # print(p,i)
        if i not in p:
            return False
        x+=p.index(i)
        x+=1
        
    return True

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):

    # s = 0
    # e = len(letters) - 1

    # ans = letters[0]

    # while s <= e:

    #     mid = (s + e) // 2

    #     if letters[mid] > target:

    #         ans = letters[mid]
    #         e = mid - 1

    #     else:
    #         s = mid + 1

    # return ans

  
    l=(letters)
    s=0
    e=len(l)-1
    ans=l[0]
    
    while s<=e:
        mid=(s+e)//2
        if l[mid]>target:
            ans=l[mid]
            e=mid-1
        else:
            s=mid+1
    return ans

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):

    # s = 0
    # e = len(letters) - 1

    # ans = letters[0]

    # while s <= e:

    #     mid = (s + e) // 2

    #     if letters[mid] > target:

    #         ans = letters[mid]
    #         e = mid - 1

    #     else:
    #         s = mid + 1

    # return ans

    def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    l=list(letters)
    s=0
    e=len(l)-1
    ans=l[0]
    
    while s<=e:
        mid=(s+e)//2
        if l[mid]>target:
            ans=l[mid]
            e=mid-1
        else:
            s=mid+1
    return ans

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    temp = head
    count= 0 

    while temp and count < 2:
        temp = temp.next
        count += 1


    curr = head
    prev = None
    count = 0

    while curr and count < 2:
        next_node = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = next_node

        count += 1
    return prev

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    return -1

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    return nums.index(target)

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    s = 0
    e = n-1
    while s<=e:
        m=(s+e)//2
        if nums[m]==target: return m 
        elif nums[m]>target:s=m+1
        else: e= m-1
    return -1

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    l = letters
    t = target
    s = 0
    e = len(l)-1
    while s<=e:
        m = (s+e)//2
        if l[m]>t:e=m-1
        else: s=m+1
    if e+1 == len(l): return l[0]
    return l[e+1]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    l = letters
    t = target
    s = 0
    e = len(l)-1
    while s<=e:
        m = (s+e)//2
        if l[m]>t:e=m-1
        else: s=m+1
    return l[e+1]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    return letters[-1]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    l = letters
    t = target
    s = 0
    e = len(l)-1
    while s<=e:
        m = (s+e)//2
        if l[m]>t:e=m-1
        else: s=m+1
    if e+1 == len(l): return -1
    return l[e+1]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    l = letters
    t = target
    s = 0
    e = len(l)-1
    while s<=e:
        m = (s+e)//2
        if l[m]>t:e=m-1
        else: s=m+1
    if e+1 == len(l): return l[0]
    return l[e+1]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    x = letters + target
    x.sort()
    y = x.index(target) + 1
    if y==len(x):
        y=0
    print(x[y])

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    y = list(letters)
    x = y + [target]
    x.sort()
    y = x.index(target) + 1
    if y==len(x):
        y=0
    return x[y]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    y = list(letters)
    x = y + [target]
    x.sort()
    y = x.index(target) + 1
    if y==len(x)-1:
        y=0
    return x[y]

def swapPairs(head):
    prev = head
    cur = head.next
    x = cur
    prev.next = None
    while cur.next!=None:
        temp = cur.next
        cur.next = prev
        prev.next = temp.next
        cur = temp.next
        prev = temp
    cur.next  = prev
    prev.next = None
    
    return x

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here
    head = root.val
    rootsum = [0]
    tsum = [0]
    def f(root):
        if root ==None:
            return 0
        if root.left == None and root.right == None:
            rootsum[0] +=root.val
        tsum[0]+=root.val
        f(root.left)
        f(root.right)
    f(root)
    return tsum[0]-rootsum[0]-head

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here
    if root.left == None and root.right == None :
        return 0
    head = root.val
    rootsum = [0]
    tsum = [0]
    def f(root):
        if root ==None:
            return 0
        if root.left == None and root.right == None:
            rootsum[0] +=root.val
        tsum[0]+=root.val
        f(root.left)
        f(root.right)
    f(root)
    return tsum[0]-rootsum[0]-head

attempts_details.final_attempt_code:
def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # def f(i):
    #     if i==len(letters):
    #         return letters[0]
    #     if letters[i]>target:
    #         return(letters[i])
    #     return f(i+1)
    # return f(0)
    # i=0
    # while i!=len(letters):
    #     if letters[i]>target:
    #         return(letters[i])
    #     i+=1
    # return letters[0]
    s=0
    e=len(letters)-1
    while s<=e:
        m=(s+e)//2
        if letters[m]>target>letters[m+1]:
            return letters[m]
        if target<letters[m]:
            s=m+1
        else:
            e=m-1
        return letters[0]

attempts_details.first_attempt_code:
'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    l=[]
    def f(root):
        if not root:
            return 
        l.append(root.val)
        f(root.right)
        f(root.left)
    f(root)
    a=sum(l)
    leaf=[]
    def f1(root):
        if not root:
            return 
        if(root.left==None and root.right==None):
            leaf.append(root.val)
        f1(root.right)
        f1(root.left)
    f1(root)
    b=sum(leaf)
    c=root.val
    return a-b-c

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # for i in letters:
    #     if ord(i)>ord(target):
    #         return i
    # return letters[0]
    s=0
    e=len(letters)-1
    a=""
    while s<=e:
        m=(s+e)//2
        if ord(letters[m])==ord(target) and s==e:
            break
        if ord(letters[m])>ord(target):
            a=letters[m]
            e=m-1
        if ord(letters[m])<ord(target):
            s=m+1
    return a

attempts.source_code:
def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # for i in letters:
    #     if ord(i)>ord(target):
    #         return i
    # return letters[0]
    s=0
    e=len(letters)-1
    a=""
    while s<=e:
        m=(s+e)//2
        if ord(letters[m])==ord(target) and s==e:
            break
        if ord(letters[m])>ord(target):
            a=letters[m]
            e=m-1
        if ord(letters[m])<ord(target):
            s=m+1
    return a

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''
c=0
def count_frequency(root, k):
    global c
    if root==None:
        return
    if root.val==k:
        c+=1
    left=count_frequency(root.left, k)
    right=count_frequency(root.right, k)
    return c

    class Node:

            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    prev=None
    curr=head

        prev=curr
        curr=nxt
    return prev

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    curr=head
    curr.next=curr.next.next
    curr.next.next=head
    while curr:
        curr.next=curr.next.next
        curr.next.next=curr

        curr=curr.next

    return head

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    for i in letters:
        if i > target:
            return i
    # s = 0
    # e = len(letters) - 1

    # while s <= e:

    #     if mid == 0:

    #     else:

    #             return letters[mid]

    #         elif letters[mid] < target:
    #             s = mid + 1
    #         else:
    #             e = mid - 1

    return letters[0]

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    while curr:
        front = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = front
    return prev

attempts.source_code:
'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    p1 = None
    n1 = None
    c1= head
    while c1:
        n1 = c1.next.next
        c1.next.next = p1
        p1 = c1
        c1 = n1

    p2= None
    n2 = None
    c2 = p1
    while c2:
        n2 = c2.next
        c2.next = p2
        p2 = c2
        c2 = n2
    return p2

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    dummy = Node(0)
    dummy.next = head
    grpprev = dummy
    kth = grpprev.next.next
    while kth is not None and kth.next is not None:
        grpnxt = kth.next
        init = grpprev.next
        grpprev.next.next = grpnxt
        kth.next = init
        grpprev.next=kth
        grpprev=init
        grpnxt=grpnxt.next.next
        kth = grpprev.next.next
    init = grpprev.next
    grpprev.next = kth
    kth.next = init
    init.next = None
    # print(grpprev.data,kth.data,init.data,grpnxt)
    return dummy.next

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if head is None:
        return head

    curr = head
    prev = None
    nextNode = None

    while curr:
        nextNode = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nextNode

    return prev

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    n= len(letters)
    start=0
    end=n-1
    ans =0
    while start<=end:
        mid=(start+end)//2
        if letters[mid]==target:
            return mid
        elif letters[mid]>target:
            start=mid+1
        else:
            end=mid-1
    return letters[0]
        
    # for i in letters:
    #     if char(i)>=char(target):
    #         return char

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def count_frequency(root, k):
    # write your code here
    count = 0
    if root is None:
        return 0
    left_search = count_frequency(root.left)
    right_search = count_frequency(root.right)

    if left_search == k or right_search == k:
        count += 1
    return count

attempts.source_code:
def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # s=0
    # e=len(letters)-1
    # ans=max(letters)
    # while(s<=e):
    #     mid=(s+e//2)
    #     if(letters[mid]>target):
    #         if(letters[mid]<ans):
    #             ans=letters[mid]
    #         e=mid-1
    #     else:
    #         s=mid+1
    # if(ans>target):
    #     return ans
    # return letters[0]

    s=0
    e=len(letters)-1
    ans=max(letters)
    while(s<=e):
        mid=(s+e)//2
        if(letters[mid]>target and letters[mid]<ans):
            ans=letters[mid]
            s=mid+1
        else:
            e=mid-1
    return ans

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    start = 0
    end = len(letters) -1

    # print(ord(target))
    # print(ord(letters[2]))

    ans = -1
    while end >= start:
        mid = (start+ end)//2

        if ord(letters[mid]) > ord(target):          
            ans = letters[mid]
            end = mid-1

        else:
            start   = mid+1

    if ans == -1:
        return letters[0]
    else:
        return ans

    end = len(letters) -1

    while end >= start:

            ans = letters[mid]
            end = mid-1

        else:
            start   = mid+1

    ans = -1
    while end >= start:
        mid = (start+ end)//2

        if ord(letters[mid]) > ord(target):

        else:

    if ans == -1:

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here
    r = root.val
    lst = []
    leaf = []
    def traverse(node):
        if node is None:
            return 
        if node.left is None and node.right is None:
            leaf.append(node.val)
        
        traverse(node.left)
        traverse(node.right)
        lst.append(node.val)

        
    traverse(root)
    return sum(lst) - sum(leaf) - r

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here
    r = root.val
    lst = []
    leaf = []
    def traverse(node):
        if node is None:
            return 
        if node.left is None and node.right is None:
            leaf.append(node.val)
        
        traverse(node.left)
        traverse(node.right)
        lst.append(node.val)

        
    traverse(root)
    return sum(lst) - sum(leaf) - r

    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    current = head 

    while current and current.next is not None:
        front = current.next 
        current.next = prev 
        prev = current
        current = front 

    return head

        self.right = None

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here

        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here
    sumi = 0

    def dfs(node):
        nonlocal sumi 

        if node is None:
            return None
        
        dfs(node.left)

        if node.left is not None or node.right is not None and node.val > -1:
            sumi += node.val

        dfs(node.right)

    dfs(root)
    return sumi - root.val

self.next = None

def swapPairs(head,k=2):
    curr = head
    count = 0
    while curr and count<k:
        curr = curr.next
        count+=1
    if count <k:
        return head
    curr = head
    prev = None
    count = 0
    while curr and count<k:
        nst = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nst
        count+=1
    head.next = swapPairs(curr,2)
    return prev

    curr = head

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):

    dummy = Node(-1)
    prev = dummy
    temp = head
    
    while temp.next != None:
        
        nextOne = temp.next
        temp.next = prev
        prev = temp
        temp = nextOne

    temp.next = prev
    head.next = None 
    return temp

'''
    class Node:

'''

    dummy = Node(-1)
    prev = dummy
    temp = head
    
    while temp.next != None:
        
        nextOne = temp.next
        temp.next = prev
        prev = temp
        temp = nextOne

    temp.next = prev
    head.next = None 
    return temp

class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def reverse(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    count = 0

    while curr!=None and count<2:
        temp = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = temp
        count+=1

    return prev,curr

def swapPairs(head):
    if head==None:
        return head

    temp = head
    count = 0

    while temp!=None and count<2:
        temp = temp.next
        count+=1

    if count<2:
        return head

    prev, curr = reverse(head)

    head.next = swapPairs(curr)

    return prev

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def reverse(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    count = 0

    while curr!=None and count<2:
        temp = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = temp
        count+=1

    return prev,curr

def swapPairs(head):
    if head==None:
        return head

    temp = head
    count = 0

    while temp!=None and count<2:
        temp = temp.next
        count+=1

    if count<2:
        return head

    prev, curr = reverse(head)

    head.next = swapPairs(curr)

    return prev

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):

    if head == None or head.next == None:
        return head

    prev = None
    curr = head
    head = head.next

    while curr != None and curr.next != None:

        front = curr.next

        # swapping links
        curr.next = front.next
        front.next = curr

        # connect previous pair
        if prev != None:
            prev.next = front

        # move prev and curr
        prev = curr
        curr = curr.next

    return head

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, data):
        self.data = data
        self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):

    if head == None or head.next == None:
        return head

    prev = None
    curr = head
    head = head.next

    while curr != None and curr.next != None:

        front = curr.next

        # swapping links
        curr.next = front.next
        front.next = curr

        # connect previous pair
        if prev != None:
            prev.next = front

        # move prev and curr
        prev = curr
        curr = curr.next

    return head

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def count_frequency(root, k):
    # write your code here
    count = []
    def pre(node):
        if node==None:
            return None
        pre(node.left)
        count.append(node.val)
        # if node.val==k:
        #     count+=1
        pre(node.right)
    pre(root)
    result = 0
    for i in count:
        if i==k:
            result+=1
    return result

    while s<=e:
        mid=(s+e)//2
        if letters[mid]>target:
            ans=mid
            e=mid-1
        else:
            s=mid+1
    if ans!=-1:
     return letters[ans]
    else: return letters[0]

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    
    left = n
    right = 0

    while right<=left:
        # if target==nums[0]:
        #     return 0
        # elif target == nums[-1]:
        #     return len(nums)-1
        mid = (left+right)//2
        if nums[mid]== target:
            return mid
        if nums[mid]<target:
            right = mid+1
        elif nums[mid]>target:
            left = mid -1

    return -1

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if(head==None):
        return None
    if(head.next==None):
        return head
    prev=None
    newnode=None
    while(head!=None):
        newnode=head.next
        head.next=prev
        prev=head
        head=newnode
    return prev

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if(head==None):
        return None
    if(head.next==None):
        return head
    prev=None
    newnode=None
    while(head!=None):
        newnode=head.next
        head.next=prev
        prev=head
        head=newnode
    return prev

attempts.source_code:
def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # def f(s,e):
    #     mid=(s+e)//2
    #     if(s>=e):
    #         if(letters[mid]!=target):
    #             return letters[0]
    #         else:
    #             return letters[mid]
    #     if(letters[mid]==target):
    #         if(letters[mid-1]==target):
    #             return f(s,mid-1)
    #         elif(letters[mid-1]!=target):
    #             return letters[mid-1]
    #     if(letters[mid]>target):
    #         return f(mid+1,e)
    #     else:
    #         return f(s,mid-1)
    # return f(0,len(letters)-1)
    s=0
    e=len(letters)-1
    while(s<=e):
        mid=(s+e)//2
        if(letters[mid]==target):
            if(letters[mid-1]==target):
                e=mid-1
                continue
            else:
                return letters[mid]
        elif(letters[mid]>target):
            e=mid-1
        else:
            s=mid+1
    return letters[0]

        mid=(s+e)//2
        if(letters[mid]==target):

            else:
                return letters[mid+1]

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    # arr=[]
    # def bin(nums,strt,end,mid):
    #     mid=(strt+end)//2
    #     if strt>=end:
    #         return 
    #     if nums[mid]==target:
    #         arr.append(mid)
    #         return 
    #     elif nums[mid]>target:
    #         bin(nums,mid+1,end,mid)
    #     else:
    #         bin(nums,strt,mid,mid)
    # if n==1:
    #     if nums[0]==target:
    #         return 0
    #     else:
    #         return -1
    # else:
    #     bin(nums,0,n-1,target)
    #     if len(arr)==0:
    #         return -1
    #     else:
    #         return arr[0]


    strt=0
    end=n
    # mid=(strt+end)//2
    while strt<end:
        
        mid=(strt+end)//2
        if nums[mid]==target:
            return mid
        if nums[mid]>target:

        if nums[mid]<target:
            end=mid
    return -1

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def count_frequency(root, k):
    count = 0
    if root==None:
        return -1
    if root.val==k:
        count+=1
        return count
        
    left = count_frequency(root.left, k)
    right = count_frequency(root.right, k)
    return left or right

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    prev=None
    curr=head
    while(curr):
        front=curr.next
        curr.next=prev
        prev=curr
        curr=front
    return prev

attempts_details.first_attempt_code:
'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def count_frequency(root, k):
    # write your code here
    if root == None:
        return 0
    
    count=0
    if root.val ==k:
        count+=1
    left=count_frequency(root.left,k)
    right=count_frequency(root.right,k)

    return count + left + right

attempts.source_code:
'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def count_frequency(root, k):
    # write your code here
    if root == None:
        return 0
    
    count=0
    if root.val ==k:
        count+=1
    left=count_frequency(root.left,k)
    right=count_frequency(root.right,k)

    return count + left + right

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    def findkthNode(curr, k):
        k -= 1
        while k>0 and curr is not None:
            k-=1
            curr = curr.next
        return curr
    def reverse(head):
        prev = None
        curr = head
        agla = None
        while curr is not None:
            agla = curr.next
            curr.next = prev
            prev = curr
            curr = agla
        # return prev
    # return findkthNode(head, 2)
    temp = head 
    prevNode = None
    while temp is not None:
        kthNode = findkthNode(temp, 2)
        if kthNode is None:
            if prevNode:
                prevNode.next = temp
                break
        nextNode = kthNode.next
        kthNode.next = None
        reverse(temp)
        if temp == head:
            head = kthNode
        else:
            prevNode.next = kthNode
        prevNode = temp
        temp = nextNode
    return head

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    def findkthNode(curr, k):
        k -= 1
        while k>0 and curr is not None:
            k-=1
            curr = curr.next
        return curr
    def reverse(head):
        prev = None
        curr = head
        agla = None
        while curr is not None:
            agla = curr.next
            curr.next = prev
            prev = curr
            curr = agla
        # return prev
    # return findkthNode(head, 2)
    temp = head 
    prevNode = None
    while temp is not None:
        kthNode = findkthNode(temp, 2)
        if kthNode is None:
            if prevNode:
                prevNode.next = temp
                break
        nextNode = kthNode.next
        kthNode.next = None
        reverse(temp)
        if temp == head:
            head = kthNode
        else:
            prevNode.next = kthNode
        prevNode = temp
        temp = nextNode
    return head

attempts.source_code:
def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    ans=[]
    sub=""
    def find(s,i):
        nonlocal sub
        if i==len(s):
            if sub>target:
                ans.append(sub)
            return
        sub+=s[i]
        find(s,i+1)
        sub=sub[0:len(sub)-len(s[i])]
        find(s,i+1)
    find(letters,0)
    return sorted(ans)[0]

class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    arr=[]
    cur=head
    while cur!=None:
        arr.append(cur.data)
        cur=cur.next
    for i in range(0,len(arr)-1,2):
        arr[i],arr[i+1]=arr[i+1],arr[i]
    cur=head
    j=0
    while cur!=None:
        cur.data=arr[j]
        cur=cur.next
        j+=1
    nh=Node(-1)
    nh.next=head
    return nh.next

    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    nextn = curr

    while curr != None:
        nextn = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nextn
    
    return prev

attempts_details.title: Problem 25044

attempts_details.first_attempt_code:
'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    sum1 = 0
    def inner(node):
        nonlocal sum1

        if node == None or (node.left == None and node.right == None):
            return
        
        sum1 += node.val
        inner(node.left)
        inner(node.right)
    
    inner(root)
    return sum1-root.val

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # for i in letters:
    #     if ord(i)>ord(target):
    #         return i 
    if ord(letters[0])>ord(target):
        return letters[0]
    l = 0
    r = len(letters)-1
    ans = letters[0]
    while l<=r:
        mid= (l+r)//2
        if ord(letters[mid])>ord(target):
            ans = mid
            r = mid-1
        else:
            l = mid+1

    return letters[ans]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # for i in letters:
    #     if ord(i)>ord(target):
    #         return i 
    if ord(letters[0])>ord(target):
        return letters[0]
    l = 0
    r = len(letters)-1
    ans = letters[0]
    while l<=r:
        mid= (l+r)//2
        if ord(letters[mid])>ord(target):
            ans = mid
            r = mid-1
        else:
            l = mid+1

    return letters[ans]

def __init__(self, data):

'''

def swapPairs(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    if curr==None:
        return head
    for i in range(2):
        front = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = front
    head.next = swapPairs(curr)
    return prev

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if head == None:
        return None

    prev = None
    curr = head
    while curr != None:
        new = curr.next
        curr = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = new

    return prev

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if head == None:
        return None

    prev = None
    curr = head
    while curr != None:
        new = curr.next
        curr = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = new

    return prev

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if head == None:
        return None

    if head.next == None:
        return None

    curr = head
    prev = None
    while curr:
        new = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = new

    return prev

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if head == None:
        return None

    curr = head
    prev = None
    while curr:
        new = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = new

    return prev

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    # left = 0
    # right = len(nums)
    # while right>=left:
    #     mid = left+right//2
    #     if nums[mid] == target:
    #         return mid
    #     elif target>nums[mid]:
    #         right = mid-1
    #     elif target<nums[mid]:
    #         left = mid+1
    # return -1

    for i in range(n):
        if nums[i] == target:
            return i
    return -1

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    ans = letters[0]
    i = 0
    j = len(letters)-1
    while i<=j:
        mid = (i+j)//2
        if ord(target) <= ord(letters[mid]):
            # if ord(letters[mid])<=ord(ans):
            ans = letters[mid]
            j = mid-1
        elif ord(target) > ord(letters[mid]):
            i = mid+1
        # else:
        #     j = mid-1
    return ans

    prev = dummy

    while curr:

        curr = curr.next
        prev.next = curr

attempts.source_code:
'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    dummy = Node(0)
    dummy.next = head
    prev = dummy
    curr = head
    while curr:
        temp = curr
        curr = curr.next
        prev.next = curr
        temp.next = curr.next
        curr.next = temp
        prev = temp
        curr = temp.next
    
    return dummy.next

    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    curr=head
    n=0
    arr=[]
    while curr:
        arr.append(curr.data)
        curr=curr.next
        n+=1
    for i in range(len(arr)-1,-1,-1):
        print(arr[i],end=" ")

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if n==1:
        return head
    prev=None
    curr=head
    while curr:
        curr.next,prev,curr=prev,curr,curr.next
    return prev

    temp=head
    prev=None

attempts.source_code:
def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    
    a = 0
    b = len(letters)-1
    gen = 0
    while a<=b:
        mid = (a+b)//2
        if letters[mid] == target:
            return letters[mid+1]
        elif letters[mid]>target:
            gen = letters[mid]
            b = mid -1
        else:
            a = mid + 1
    return gen
    # arr = []
    # for i in range(len(letters)):
    #     if letters[i]>target:
    #         arr.append(letters[i])

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # left=0
    # right=len(letters)
    # ans=letters[0]
    # while left<right:
    #     mid=(left+right)//2
    #     if letters[mid]>target:
    #         ans=letters[mid]
    #         right=mid-1
    #     else:
    #         left=mid+1
    # return ans
    return letters[0]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    left=0
    right=len(letters)
    ans=''
    while left<right:
        mid=(left+right)//2
        if letters[mid]>target:
            ans=letters[mid]
            right=mid-1
        else:
            left=mid+1
    # if letters[0]>target and letters[0]<=ans:
    #     return letters[0]
    return ans

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    left=0
    right=len(letters)
    ans=''
    while left<right:
        mid=(left+right)//2
        if letters[mid]>target:
            ans=letters[mid]
            right=mid-1
        else:
            left=mid+1
    # if letters[0]>target and letters[0]<=ans:
    return letters[0]
    # return ans

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    prev=None
    curr=head
    while curr:
        nxt=curr.next
        curr.next=prev
        prev=curr
        curr=nxt
    return prev

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    dummy=Node(-1)
    ans=dummy
    curr=head
    def rev(head):
        prev=None
        curr=head
        while curr:
            nxt=curr.next
            curr.next=prev
            prev=curr
            curr=nxt
        return prev
    while curr:
        farthest=curr.next.next
        curr.next.next=None
        refined=rev(curr)
        dummy.next=refined
        dummy=dummy.next.next
        dummy.next=farthest
        curr=dummy.next
    return ans.next

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def InnerSum(root):
    #write your code here
    l=root.val
    s=[0]
    def f(root):
        if root==None:
            return
        if root.left==None and root.right==None:
            return
        
        s[0]+=root.val
        f(root.left)
        f(root.right)
    f(root)
    return s[0]-l

'''
class Node:
    def __init__(self, val):
        self.val = val
        self.left = None
        self.right = None
'''

def count_frequency(root, k):
    arr = []
    def tree(root,arr):
        if root == None: return 
        else:
            arr.append(root.val)
            tree(root.left,arr)
            tree(root.right,arr)
        return arr
    a = tree(root,arr)
    count = 0
    for i in a:
        if i == k: count += 1
    return count

def __init__(self, data):

def swapPairs(head):
    def count(curr):
        c=0
        while curr and c<2:
            curr=curr.next
        return c==2
    def rev(curr):
        prev=None
        c=0
        while curr and c<2:
            nn=curr.next
            curr.next=prev
            prev=curr
            curr=nn
            c+=1
        return curr,prev
    d=Node(-1)
    d.next=head
    curr=head
    prev=d
    while curr:
        ns,nh=rev(curr)
        prev.next=nh
        curr.next=ns
        prev=curr
        curr=ns
    return d.next

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    def count(curr):
        c=0
        while curr and c<2:
            curr=curr.next
        return c==2
    def rev(curr):
        prev=None
        c=0
        while curr and c<2:
            nn=curr.next
            curr.next=prev
            prev=curr
            curr=nn
            c+=1
        return curr,prev
    d=Node(-1)
    d.next=head
    curr=head
    prev=d
    while curr:
        ns,nh=rev(curr)
        prev.next=nh
        curr.next=ns
        prev=curr
        curr=ns
    return d.next

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # for i in letters:
    #     if i>target:
    #         return i
    # return letters[0]
    s=0
    e=len(letters)-1

    while s<e:
        mid=(s+e)//2

        if letters[mid]>target:
            ans=letters[mid]
            e=mid-1
        else:
            s=mid+1
    return ans

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    curr = head 
    for _ in range(2):
        if not curr:
            return head 
        curr = curr.next
    
    prev = None 
    curr = head 
    for _ in range(2):
        front = curr.next 
        curr.next = prev 
        prev = curr
        curr =front 
    
    head.next = swapPairs(curr)
    return prev

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    curr = head 
    for _ in range(2):
        if not curr:
            return head 
        curr = curr.next
    
    prev = None 
    curr = head 
    for _ in range(2):
        front = curr.next 
        curr.next = prev 
        prev = curr
        curr =front 
    
    head.next = swapPairs(curr)
    return prev

        foo(i + 1)

        global sum
        if not node:

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    # s = 0
    # e = len(letters)
    # ans = ""
    # while s<=e:
    #     m = (s+e)//2
    #     if target<=letters[m]:
    #         ans = letters[m]
    #         e = m-1
    #     elif target>letters[m]:
    #         s=m+1
    # if ans:
    #     return ans
    c=0
    for let in letters:
        c+=1
        if let == target:
            break
    return letters[c+1]

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):


    # i will find all the letters greater than noo...
    # i will find hte letter greater than targret and break the loop 

    s = 0
    e = len(letters)
    ans =[]
    while s<=e:
        m = (s+e)//2
        if target<=letters[m]:
            ans.append(letters[m])

            e = m-1
        elif target>letters[m]:
            s=m+1
    return ans[0]

    # i will find all the letters greater than noo...

    ans.sort()

    curr = head
    prev = None
    while curr and curr.next:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nxt
    head = curr
    return head

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    prev = None
    curr = head
    while curr:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nxt
    return prev

    l = list(map(int, input().split()))

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    if head is None:
        return None
    prev = None
    n_node = None
    curr = head
    while curr != None:
        n_node = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = n_node
    return head

'''
    class Node:
        def __init__(self, data):   # data -> value stored in node
            self.data = data
            self.next = None
'''
def reverseLL(head):
    dummy = Node(-1)
    dummy.next = head
    temp = dummy
    curr = head
    while temp.next:
        nxt=temp.next
        temp.next=dummy
        dummy = curr
        curr=nxt
    return dummy.next

'''

            self.next = None

    dummy = Node(-1)
    temp = dummy
    prev = None
    while temp:
        nxt = temp.next
        temp.next=prev
        prev = temp
        temp = nxt
    return dummy.next

    prev = None

        prev = curr
        curr = n_node
    return prev

def nextGreatestLetter(letters, target):
    l,r = 0,len(letters)-1
    ans = ""
    found = False
    simlar = False
    while l<=r:
        mid = (l+r)//2
        if letters[mid] > target:
            ans = letters[mid]
            found = True
            break
        elif letters[mid] < target:
            l = mid+1
        else:
            ans = letters[mid+1]
            break
    return ans

def swapPairs(head):
    if head is None:
        return None
    if head.next is None:
        return head    
    
    count = 0
    curr = head
    
    # Check if at least 2 nodes exist
    while curr and count < 2:
        count += 1
        curr = curr.next
        
    if count < 2:
        return head
    
    curr = head
    count = 0  
    prev = None 
    
    # Reverse 2 nodes
    while curr and count < 2:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr 
        curr = nxt
        count += 1
    
    # Connect rest
    if curr is not None:
        head.next = swapPairs(curr)
    
    return prev

attempts.source_code:
'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    if head is None:
        return None
    count = 0
    curr = head    
    while curr and count < 2:
        count += 1
        curr = curr.next

    if count < 2:
        return 
    curr = head
    count = 0  
    prev = None 
    while curr.next and count < 2:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr 
        curr = nxt
    if nxt:
        neww = swapPairs(nxt)
        
    return curr

'''
class Node:
def __init__(self, data):
self.data = data
self.next = None
'''

def swapPairs(head):
    if head is None:
        return None
    if head.next is None:
        return head    
    count = 0
    curr = head    
    while curr:
        count += 1
        curr = curr.next

    if count < 2:
        return 
    curr = head
    count = 0  
    prev = None 
    while curr.next and count < 2:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr 
        curr = nxt
        count += 1
    if nxt is not None:
        neww = swapPairs(nxt)
    neww.next = curr.next
    curr.next = neww
    return curr

def swapPairs(head):
    if head is None:
        return None
    if head.next is None:
        return head    
    
    count = 0
    curr = head
    
    # Check if at least 2 nodes exist
    while curr and count < 2:
        count += 1
        curr = curr.next
        
    if count < 2:
        return head
    
    curr = head
    count = 0  
    prev = None 
    
    # Reverse 2 nodes
    while curr and count < 2:
        nxt = curr.next
        curr.next = prev
        prev = curr 
        curr = nxt
        count += 1
    
    # Connect rest
    if curr is not None:
        head.next = swapPairs(curr)
    
    return prev

class Node:

def swapPairs(head):
    prev = None
    nxt = None

    while curr:
        nxt = curr.next.next
        curr.next.next = prev
        prev = curr
        curr = nxt
    p1 = None

        p1 = c1

    if root==None:
        return 0
    count = 0
    if root.val==k:
        count = 1

    rs = count_frequency(root.right, k)

    ans = letters[-1]
    low,high = 0,len(letters)-1
    while low <= high:

            ans = letters[mid]
            high = mid-1
        else:
            low = mid+1
    return ans

    while temp != None:

    return prev

def isPresent(n, nums, target):
    s = 0
    e = n-1
    ans = -1
    while s <= e:
        mid = (s+e)//2
        if nums[mid] == target:
            ans = mid
            return ans
        elif nums[mid] > target:
            s = mid+1
        else:
            e = mid-1
    return ans
